b:Tfb4e,<div class="specification">
<p>An investigation into food web interactions was conducted in mesocosms in the Mediterranean Sea, off the coast of France. The effects of the addition of soil and fish on bacterial populations were tested.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Each of the mesocosms is an open ecosystem. State the property that makes the mesocosms open ecosystems.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Assuming that the populations of bacteria are under bottom-up control, identify the mesocosms in which the bacterial populations will be highest.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline top-down effects on the bacteria in the four mesocosms. </p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Suggest advantages of undertaking this experiment in the sea rather than in the laboratory.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>c:T552,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>there is exchange of matter/energy<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>there is an exchange between the surface of the water and the atmosphere ✔</p>
<p> <em>eg: matter could be nutrients/gas/water/minerals/etc; energy could be heat or light</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>soil and no fish «mesocosm» <em><strong>AND</strong></em> soil and fish «mesocosm» ✔</p>
<p><em>Both mesocosms required</em></p>
<p><em>Accept answers such as “the two with soil”</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. zooplankton feed on bacteria reducing their numbers ✔</p>
<p>b. fish feed on zooplankton «therefore» increasing bacterial population ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. conditions closer to levels experienced naturally by the organism ✔<br/><em>OWTTE</em></p>
<p>b. natural variation of abiotic variables ✔<br/><em>Accept examples, eg: temperature, dissolved oxygen</em></p>
<p>c. more natural behaviour/interactions ✔</p>
<p>d. not harm organisms by removing them from natural habitat ✔</p>
<p> </p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/c/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","c"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18N.3.HL.TZ0.14"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"HL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18N"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","c-2-communities-and-ecosystems, 4-1-species-communities-and-ecosystems"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">d.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
